title: Add CNI packages to testers
body:
Add CNI networking packages to our test hosts.  Also upgrade from f26 to f27

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Changes LGTM, but RedHat CI failing with the below.  I don't think it's related, but I don't know that.

```
+ '[' -f /run/ostree-booted ']'
+ lvresize -r -L +4G atomicos/root
  Insufficient free space: 1024 extents needed, but only 0 available
### EXITED WITH CODE 5 AFTER 0s
```

:pushpin: Commit 829be87 has been approved by `baude`

:sunny: Test successful - [status-papr](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/libpod/40f01d56aba23045d2c5077b2ea4e9f7fdfa3249.1513202188083344640/index.html)
